title: Starter: explain a concept
prompt: In 3-4 sentences, explain what a distributed task queue is and why a broker hands work to workers instead of the reverse.

title: Starter: summarize text
prompt: Summarize the following in two sentences: a pull-based grid lets ephemeral workers claim jobs when they have capacity, so the broker never pushes work at a worker that has gone offline.

title: Starter: classify intent
prompt: Classify this request as one of {bug, feature, question, chore} and give a one-line reason: 'the readiness endpoint should also report which capability is starved.'

title: Starter: write a haiku
prompt: Write a haiku about a worker joining a grid and claiming its first job.
